series_metadata.series_description: Information that assesses the health risk factors to the public regarding disease, safety & health conserns. Includes basic demographic information about survey population (no identifiers). Survey is conducted on a monthly basis.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Maintain raw data on floppy & hard drive until report is received from Centers for Disease Contro ; Paper: Maintain initial data until entered into computer storage, then destroy. After final report is compiled, maintain in office 5 years, then destroy if superseded & of no historical value to State Archives, Electronic: Erase ; Paper: Wastepaper
